title: Squirrel Removal in Midwood, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Midwood, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, entry sealing & attic cleanup. Serving Midwood homes & businesses. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Midwood home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout this charming Brooklyn neighborhood. Our experienced technicians safely remove squirrels from attics, walls, and chimneys while preventing future infestations in Midwood's historic homes and apartment buildings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Midwood residents for years with humane, effective squirrel removal solutions. We understand the unique challenges of Midwood's mix of pre-war buildings and single-family homes, offering customized treatments with transparent pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Midwood's tree-lined streets and older housing stock—from the beautiful Victorians near Brooklyn College to the brick apartment complexes along Avenue M—create ideal conditions for squirrel activity. The neighborhood's proximity to Marine Park and numerous mature oak and maple trees means squirrels frequently seek shelter in attics and crawl spaces, especially during colder months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Midwood typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, entry point sealing, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Midwood properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Midwood home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Midwood locations. The removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and access points. Our technicians will set humane traps, monitor daily, and seal entry points once all squirrels are removed to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Midwood, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Midwood due to the neighborhood's abundant trees, especially around residential streets near Brooklyn College and Midwood Park. The area's older homes with wooden soffits, roof vents, and chimney gaps provide easy access for squirrels seeking warm nesting sites, particularly in fall and winter.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane squirrel removal in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, NYC-compliant methods for squirrel removal in Midwood. Our approach includes live trapping and relocation, one-way exclusion doors, and thorough sealing of entry points. We never use poisons or harmful methods, ensuring the safety of your family, pets, and the animals themselves.
